valueBeats: AI answers shape what you see.
Imbas shows what surfaced  —  and what didn’t.
roadmapBlocks: Imbas documents how frontier models behave, one case at a time.
Live measurement while you read. Surface what appeared, what didn’t, and where the answer narrowed.
desktop-1440.readersCallout: Not another answer. A way to inspect the one you already got.
desktop-1440.readersBody: AI answers feel complete because you only see what surfaced. Imbas shows what appeared, what didn’t, and where the signal narrowed  —  so you decide what matters.
